Compare Period Report: Capture vs. Replay

Collapse all sections Expand all sections

This report compares the performance of a workload replay against the performance of the original captured system. Throughout the report "Capture" refers to the original captured system, while "Replay" refers to the replayed workload. The most reliable experiment would compare two replays. The first replay would try to mimic the captured system as much as possible without any system changes. The second replay would be similar to the first while applying a single change as the test variable. (Test systems are almost always an approximation of production. The idea in comparing two replays is to isolate the change we want to apply and thus assess the effect of such a change on a system similar to production.)

(+) (-) General Information

This section describes the experimental setup. Check it carefully to verify that the intended experiment was performed.

(+) (-) Replay Divergence

This section describes the divergence in replay compared to the captured system. Please look at the full divergence report if this report shows significant divergence. The possible divergence levels are: (NONE) no divergence detected at all (LOW) minimal divergence detected but the performance comparison is most likely still valid (MEDIUM) some non-trivial divergence is detected and the performance comparison is suspect (HIGH) severe divergence detected and the performance comparison is unlikely to be informative.

Divergence Level Percent of Calls That Diverged
Replay Divergence (compared to Capture) LOW .07%

(+) (-) Main Performance Statistics

This section does a high-level performance comparison of the two periods. Start by looking for a change in Database Time. If there is no significant change in Database Time, you can assume performance as a whole is similar. You can look for a change in the Database Time pieces that follow (CPU, User I/O, and Cluster) to see how the different ingredients of Database Time changed from one period to the next, either to explain a change in Database Time or to see if some pieces regressed and others improved.

Change in DB time Capture total time Replay total time Capture % of DB time Replay % of DB time
Database Time -27.6% 8294.52 seconds 6005.22 seconds 100 100
CPU Time 16.25% 800.42 seconds 930.49 seconds 9.65 15.49
User I/O Wait Time 32.92% 31.54 seconds 41.92 seconds .38 .7

(+) (-) Top SQL/Call

(+) (-) Top SQL by Change in DB Time

This section compares the performance change of individual SQL statements from one period to the next. SQL statements are identified by their force matching signature to account for literal usage. They are ordered by the total change in DB Time, as the most relevant changes are those that impact total throughput the most. Any SQL tuning you do should begin with the statement that regressed by the most DB Time.

(+) (-) Top Call by Change in DB Time

This section compares the performance change of individual database calls from one period to the next. A call is identified by File ID and Call Counter. They are ordered by the change in DB Time, as the most relevant changes are those that impact total throughput the most. SQL_ID and SQL text are displayed for information purpose about the call. Any SQL tuning you do should begin with the statement that regressed by the most DB Time.

(+) (-) Hardware Usage Comparison

(+) (-) CPU Usage

This section describes general CPU usage on the systems and helps assess if they were CPU bound. The number of CPUs is summed over all instances. CPU usage is averaged over instances. Note that "Oracle Run-queue Load" is for Oracle processes only and usually underestimates the run-queue part.

system CPU Sockets/Cores/Threads Hosts' CPU Usage Oracle Sessions on CPU Oracle Run-queue Load
Capture 1/2/2 95.4% 1.32 active sessions 2.44 active sessions
Replay 1/1/2 97.68% 1.64 active sessions 6.22 active sessions

(+) (-) I/O to Data and Temp Files

This section shows some basic I/O statistics about data and temp files. First look at the single block read time. An I/O bound system will show a high value (much more than 10 miliseconds). The total read/write rates should provide some guidance to determine if high single-block latencies are caused by an excess of requests from the database or poor I/O throughput in general.

Capture Replay
average time of single block read (miliseconds) 3.01 .14
total number of single block reads 31985 523134
total physical read G 4.055 G
total physical write G 6.132 G
read rate M per sec 6.978M per sec
write rate M per sec 10.553M per sec

(+) (-) ADDM Comparison

This section provides a comparison of ADDM analyses of the two time periods ordered by the absolute difference in impact. By comparing ADDM results for the two periods, you can see problems that existed in one but not the other, as well as a change in individual finding impacts. If your change is intended to improve database throughput, you should see that improvement reflected in the ADDM findings and impacts.

impact (sec) average active sessions percent active sessions

(+) (-) WITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003621','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003621','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) / 10 )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ',' || a.session_id || ',' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id ,nvl(action,'NULL') as action,decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ',' || blocking_session || ',' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session,floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id,0)/4294967296) as capture_id,nvl(client_id,'NULL') as client_id,nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id,nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop,nvl(ecid,'NULL') as ecid,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event,a.is_captured as is_captured,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background,a.is_replayed as is_replayed,nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine,machine || ',' || port as machine_port,nvl(module,'NULL') as module,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model,8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) ELSE 0 END) as object,decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ',' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql,decode(plsql_object_id, null,'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ',' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top,nvl(program,'NULL') as program,decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process,a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type,nvl(force_matching_signature,0) as sql_fms,nvl(top_level_sql_id,'NULL') as sql_id_top,sql_opcode as sql_opcode,top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || sql_plan_hash_value || ',' || sql_plan_line_id || ',' || sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line,nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid,decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv,decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null),sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id,-1) as user_id,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class,nvl(xid,'0') as xid FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= TO_DATE('20260414003621','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < TO_DATE('20260414004121','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id ,1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (2.59619047619047619047619047619047619048)) )))) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop",xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , map_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event",xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("machine_port", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", xmlagg(xmlelement("m",xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_physical_session) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name),15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM v$instance ))) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_database_instance WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY instance_number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id,m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT id as consumer_group_id , substr(max(lpad(to_char(sequence#),32,'0') || name),33) as name FROM v$rsrc_cons_group_history WHERE (id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) GROUP BY id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 1308981413,792328793,'Y','PDB','N','Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) ,obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name,'/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name,'/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql,1, instr(pl_sql, ',')-1), '0')) ,to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ',')+1), '0')) , NULL ,'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%,%' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_sql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_service_name WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, v$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 1308981413,792328793,'Y','Y','N','Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, decode(u.common,'YES', 'y', 'n') as common FROM map_user_id m, dba_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions",'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count,physical_session,instance_number,action,blocking_session,capture_id,client_id,consumer_group_id,dbop,ecid,event,is_captured,is_filtered_out,is_nc_background,is_replayed,machine,machine_port,module,object,pl_sql,pl_sql_top,program,px_process,service_hash,session_type,sql_fms,sql_id_top,sql_opcode,sql_opcode_top,sql_rws,sql_rws_line,sqlid,sqlid_fullphv,sqlid_phv,user_id,wait_class,xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N,N,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,N,N,N,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,N,Y,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y'), xmlelement("data", xmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ',' || ash.bucket_number || ',' || ROUND(ash.sample_count,2) || ',' || map_physical_session.id || ',' || map_instance_number.id || ',' ||map_action.id|| ',' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ',' ||map_captureid.id|| ',' ||map_client_id.id|| ',' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ',' ||map_dbop.id|| ',' ||map_ecid.id|| ',' ||map_event.id|| ',' ||is_captured|| ',' ||is_filtered_out|| ',' ||is_nc_background|| ',' ||is_replayed|| ',' ||map_machine.id|| ',' ||map_machine_port.id|| ',' ||map_module.id|| ',' ||map_object.id|| ',' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ',' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ',' ||map_program.id|| ',' ||px_process|| ',' ||map_service.id|| ',' ||session_type|| ',' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ',' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ',' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ',' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ',' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ',' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ',' ||map_sqlid.id|| ',' ||map_fullphv.id|| ',' ||map_phv.id|| ',' ||map_user_id.id|| ',' ||map_waitclass.id|| ',' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number ,map_action,map_blk_sess,map_captureid,map_client_id,map_consumer_id,map_dbop,map_ecid,map_event,map_machine,map_machine_port,map_module,map_object,map_plsqlid,map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid,map_program,map_service,map_sqlfms,map_sqlid map_top_sqlid,sql_opcode_map,sql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode,map_sql_rws,map_sql_rws_line,map_sqlid,map_fullphv,map_phv,map_user_id,map_waitclass,map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.sql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(2.59619047619047619047619047619047619048, 4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.xml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml, map_machine_xml, map_machine_port_xml, map_module_xml, obj_name_xml, plsql_id_name_xml, map_program_xml, serv_hash_name_xml, map_sqlfms_xml, sql_opcode_xml, map_sqlrws_xml, map_sqlrwsline_xml, sql_id_text_xml, map_fullphv_xml, map_phv_xml, user_name_xml, map_waitclass_xml, map_xid_xml ) SELECT ashdata.data FROM ashdata WITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERG [...]

(+) (-) WITH mem_source AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date ) / :bucket_size )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) * 10 as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ',' || a.session_id || ',' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id ,nvl(action,'NULL') as action,decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ',' || blocking_session || ',' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session,floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id,0)/4294967296) as capture_id,nvl(client_id,'NULL') as client_id,nvl(client_info,'NULL') as client_info,nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id,nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop,nvl(ecid,'NULL') as ecid,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event,a.is_captured as is_captured,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background,a.is_replayed as is_replayed,nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine,machine || ',' || port as machine_port,nvl(module,'NULL') as module,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model,8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) ELSE 0 END) as object,decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ',' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql,decode(plsql_object_id, null,'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ',' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top,nvl(program,'NULL') as program,decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process,a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type,nvl(force_matching_signature,0) as sql_fms,nvl(top_level_sql_id,'NULL') as sql_id_top,sql_opcode as sql_opcode,top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || sql_plan_hash_value || ',' || sql_plan_line_id || ',' || sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line,nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid,decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv,decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null),sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id,-1) as user_id,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class,nvl(xid,'0') as xid FROM SYS.V_$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= :begin_date AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < :end_date AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id ,1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (:sample_ratio * 10)) ) ) ,mem_times AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ instance_number as inst_id, MIN(sample_id) as min_sample_id FROM mem_source GROUP BY instance_number ) ,disk_times AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ DISTINCT a.instance_number as inst_id FROM AWR_PDB_DATABASE_INSTANCE a WHERE a.dbid = :dbid ) ,sample_id_bounds AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ d.inst_id, m.min_sample_id FROM disk_times d FULL OUTER JOIN mem_times m ON (d.inst_id = m.inst_id) ) , disk_source AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ TRUNC(86400*(CAST((a.sample_time_utc ) AS DATE)-:begin_date)) as t, TRUNC(86400*(CAST((a.sample_time_utc ) AS DATE)-:begin_date ) / :bucket_size )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state ,a.usecs_per_row/1000000 as sample_count, a.instance_number as instance_number, a.instance_number || ',' || a.session_id || ',' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id ,nvl(action,'NULL') as action,decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ',' || blocking_session || ',' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session,floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id,0)/4294967296) as capture_id,nvl(client_id,'NULL') as client_id,nvl(client_info,'NULL') as client_info,nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id,nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop,nvl(ecid,'NULL') as ecid,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event,a.is_captured as is_captured,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background,a.is_replayed as is_replayed,nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine,machine || ',' || port as machine_port,nvl(module,'NULL') as module,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model,8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) ELSE 0 END) as object,decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ',' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql,decode(plsql_object_id, null,'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ',' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top,nvl(program,'NULL') as program,decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process,a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type,nvl(force_matching_signature,0) as sql_fms,nvl(top_level_sql_id,'NULL') as sql_id_top,sql_opcode as sql_opcode,top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || sql_plan_hash_value || ',' || sql_plan_line_id || ',' || sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line,nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid,decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv,decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null),sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id,-1) as user_id,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class,nvl(xid,'0') as xid FROM AWR_PDB_ACTIVE_SESS_HISTORY a , sample_id_bounds WHERE a.dbid = :dbid AND a.snap_id >= :begin_snap AND a.snap_id <= :end_snap + 1 AND a.sample_time_utc >= :begin_timestamp AND a.sample_time_utc < :end_timestamp AND a.instance_number = sample_id_bounds.inst_id AND (sample_id_bounds.min_sample_id IS NULL OR sample_id_bounds.min_sample_id > a.sample_id) AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle' ) ) ,unified_ash AS (SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM (SELECT * FROM mem_source UNION ALL SELECT * FROM disk_source)) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_client_info as (SELECT client_info, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_info FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_info_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_info", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_info) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_info) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop",sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , map_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event",sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("machine_port", sys.sys_ixmlagg(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m",xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash ORDER BY physical_session)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM (SELECT * FROM map_physical_session ORDER BY id)) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name),15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM ( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM SYS.V_$instance ) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_PDB_database_instance WHERE dbid = 3345192309 GROUP BY instance_number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id,m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT consumer_group_id , max(CONSUMER_GROUP_NAME) as name FROM AWR_PDB_RSRC_CONSUMER_GROUP WHERE dbid = 3345192309 AND (consumer_group_id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) AND snap_id >= 302 AND snap_id <= 304 GROUP BY consumer_group_id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 3345192309,3345192309,'Y','PDB','N','Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) ,obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name,'/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name,'/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql,1, instr(pl_sql, ',')-1), '0')) ,to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ',')+1), '0')) , NULL ,'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%,%' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_sql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_PDB_service_name WHERE dbid = 3345192309 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, sys.v_$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 3345192309,3345192309,'Y','Y','N','Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, CASE WHEN (u.common='YES' AND u.application='NO') THEN 'y' ELSE 'n' END as common FROM map_user_id m, dba_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions",'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count,physical_session,instance_number,action,blocking_session,capture_id,client_id,client_info,consumer_group_id,dbop,ecid,event,is_captured,is_filtered_out,is_nc_background,is_replayed,machine,machine_port,module,object,pl_sql,pl_sql_top,program,px_process,service_hash,session_type,sql_fms,sql_id_top,sql_opcode,sql_opcode_top,sql_rws,sql_rws_line,sqlid,sqlid_fullphv,sqlid_phv,user_id,wait_class,xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N,N,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,N,N,N,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,N,Y,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y'), xmlelement("data", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ',' || ash.bucket_number || ',' || ROUND(ash.sample_count,2) || ',' || map_physical_session.id || ',' || map_instance_number.id || ',' ||map_action.id|| ',' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ',' ||map_captureid.id|| ',' ||map_client_id.id|| ',' ||map_client_info.id|| ',' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ',' ||map_dbop.id|| ',' ||map_ecid.id|| ',' ||map_event.id|| ',' ||is_captured|| ',' ||is_filtered_out|| ',' ||is_nc_background|| ',' ||is_replayed|| ',' ||map_machine.id|| ',' ||map_machine_port.id|| ',' ||map_module.id|| ',' ||map_object.id|| ',' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ',' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ',' ||map_program.id|| ',' ||px_process|| ',' ||map_service.id|| ',' ||session_type|| ',' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ',' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ',' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ',' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ',' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ',' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ',' ||map_sqlid.id|| ',' ||map_fullphv.id|| ',' ||map_phv.id|| ',' ||map_user_id.id|| ',' ||map_waitclass.id|| ',' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t, ash.physical_session))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number ,map_action,map_blk_sess,map_captureid,map_client_id,map_client_info,map_consumer_id,map_dbop,map_ecid,map_event,map_machine,map_machine_port,map_module,map_object,map_plsqlid,map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid,map_program,map_service,map_sqlfms,map_sqlid map_top_sqlid,sql_opcode_map,sql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode,map_sql_rws,map_sql_rws_line,map_sqlid,map_fullphv,map_phv,map_user_id,map_waitclass,map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.client_info = map_client_info.client_info AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.sql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(nvl(:sample_ratio,1),4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , map_client_info_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.xml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, map_client_info_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml, map_machine_xml, map_machine_port_xml, map_module_xml, obj_name_xml, plsql_id_name_xml, map_program_xml, serv_hash_name_xml, map_sqlfms_xml, sql_opcode_xml, map_sqlrws_xml, map_sqlrwsline_xml, sql_id_text_xml, map_fullphv_xml, map_phv_xml, user_name_xml, map_waitclass_xml, map_xid_xml ) SELECT (+) (-) WITH unified_ash AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003621','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-TO_DATE('20260414003621','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) / 10 )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ',' || a.session_id || ',' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id ,nvl(action,'NULL') as action,decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ',' || blocking_session || ',' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session,floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id,0)/4294967296) as capture_id,nvl(client_id,'NULL') as client_id,nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id,nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop,nvl(ecid,'NULL') as ecid,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event,a.is_captured as is_captured,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background,a.is_replayed as is_replayed,nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine,machine || ',' || port as machine_port,nvl(module,'NULL') as module,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model,8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) ELSE 0 END) as object,decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ',' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql,decode(plsql_object_id, null,'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ',' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top,nvl(program,'NULL') as program,decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process,a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type,nvl(force_matching_signature,0) as sql_fms,nvl(top_level_sql_id,'NULL') as sql_id_top,sql_opcode as sql_opcode,top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || sql_plan_hash_value || ',' || sql_plan_line_id || ',' || sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line,nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid,decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv,decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null),sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id,-1) as user_id,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class,nvl(xid,'0') as xid FROM V$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= TO_DATE('20260414003621','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < TO_DATE('20260414004121','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id ,1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (2.59619047619047619047619047619047619048)) )))) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop",xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , map_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event",xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("machine_port", XMLAGG(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", xmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", xmlagg(xmlelement("m",xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", xmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_physical_session) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name),15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM TABLE(GV$(CURSOR( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM v$instance ))) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_database_instance WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY instance_number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id,m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT id as consumer_group_id , substr(max(lpad(to_char(sequence#),32,'0') || name),33) as name FROM v$rsrc_cons_group_history WHERE (id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) GROUP BY id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 1308981413,792328793,'Y','PDB','N','Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) ,obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name,'/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name,'/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql,1, instr(pl_sql, ',')-1), '0')) ,to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ',')+1), '0')) , NULL ,'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%,%' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_sql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_ROOT_service_name WHERE dbid = 1308981413 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, v$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 1308981413,792328793,'Y','Y','N','Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, decode(u.common,'YES', 'y', 'n') as common FROM map_user_id m, dba_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", XMLAGG( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions",'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count,physical_session,instance_number,action,blocking_session,capture_id,client_id,consumer_group_id,dbop,ecid,event,is_captured,is_filtered_out,is_nc_background,is_replayed,machine,machine_port,module,object,pl_sql,pl_sql_top,program,px_process,service_hash,session_type,sql_fms,sql_id_top,sql_opcode,sql_opcode_top,sql_rws,sql_rws_line,sqlid,sqlid_fullphv,sqlid_phv,user_id,wait_class,xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N,N,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,N,N,N,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,N,Y,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y'), xmlelement("data", xmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ',' || ash.bucket_number || ',' || ROUND(ash.sample_count,2) || ',' || map_physical_session.id || ',' || map_instance_number.id || ',' ||map_action.id|| ',' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ',' ||map_captureid.id|| ',' ||map_client_id.id|| ',' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ',' ||map_dbop.id|| ',' ||map_ecid.id|| ',' ||map_event.id|| ',' ||is_captured|| ',' ||is_filtered_out|| ',' ||is_nc_background|| ',' ||is_replayed|| ',' ||map_machine.id|| ',' ||map_machine_port.id|| ',' ||map_module.id|| ',' ||map_object.id|| ',' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ',' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ',' ||map_program.id|| ',' ||px_process|| ',' ||map_service.id|| ',' ||session_type|| ',' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ',' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ',' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ',' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ',' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ',' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ',' ||map_sqlid.id|| ',' ||map_fullphv.id|| ',' ||map_phv.id|| ',' ||map_user_id.id|| ',' ||map_waitclass.id|| ',' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number ,map_action,map_blk_sess,map_captureid,map_client_id,map_consumer_id,map_dbop,map_ecid,map_event,map_machine,map_machine_port,map_module,map_object,map_plsqlid,map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid,map_program,map_service,map_sqlfms,map_sqlid map_top_sqlid,sql_opcode_map,sql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode,map_sql_rws,map_sql_rws_line,map_sqlid,map_fullphv,map_phv,map_user_id,map_waitclass,map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.sql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(2.59619047619047619047619047619047619048, 4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.xml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml,
