(+) (-) WITH mem_source AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date )) as t, TRUNC(86400*((CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE))-:begin_date ) / :bucket_size )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state, (a.usecs_per_row/1000000) * 10 as sample_count, USERENV('INSTANCE') as instance_number, USERENV('INSTANCE') || ',' || a.session_id || ',' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id ,nvl(action,'NULL') as action,decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ',' || blocking_session || ',' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session,floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id,0)/4294967296) as capture_id,nvl(client_id,'NULL') as client_id,nvl(client_info,'NULL') as client_info,nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id,nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop,nvl(ecid,'NULL') as ecid,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event,a.is_captured as is_captured,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background,a.is_replayed as is_replayed,nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine,machine || ',' || port as machine_port,nvl(module,'NULL') as module,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model,8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) ELSE 0 END) as object,decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ',' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql,decode(plsql_object_id, null,'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ',' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top,nvl(program,'NULL') as program,decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process,a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type,nvl(force_matching_signature,0) as sql_fms,nvl(top_level_sql_id,'NULL') as sql_id_top,sql_opcode as sql_opcode,top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || sql_plan_hash_value || ',' || sql_plan_line_id || ',' || sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line,nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid,decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv,decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null),sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id,-1) as user_id,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class,nvl(xid,'0') as xid FROM SYS.V_$ACTIVE_SESSION_HISTORY a WHERE CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) >= :begin_date AND CAST(a.sample_time_utc AS DATE) < :end_date AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle') AND ORA_HASH(USERENV('INSTANCE') || '_' || a.session_id || '_' || a.sample_id ,1000000, 0) <= (1000000 / (:sample_ratio * 10)) ) ) ,mem_times AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ instance_number as inst_id, MIN(sample_id) as min_sample_id FROM mem_source GROUP BY instance_number ) ,disk_times AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ DISTINCT a.instance_number as inst_id FROM AWR_PDB_DATABASE_INSTANCE a WHERE a.dbid = :dbid ) ,sample_id_bounds AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ d.inst_id, m.min_sample_id FROM disk_times d FULL OUTER JOIN mem_times m ON (d.inst_id = m.inst_id) ) , disk_source AS ( SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ TRUNC(86400*(CAST((a.sample_time_utc ) AS DATE)-:begin_date)) as t, TRUNC(86400*(CAST((a.sample_time_utc ) AS DATE)-:begin_date ) / :bucket_size )+1 as bucket_number, a.session_id , a.session_serial# , a.session_state ,a.usecs_per_row/1000000 as sample_count, a.instance_number as instance_number, a.instance_number || ',' || a.session_id || ',' || a.session_serial# as physical_session, a.sample_id ,nvl(action,'NULL') as action,decode(blocking_session, null, 'NULL', blocking_inst_id || ',' || blocking_session || ',' || blocking_session_serial#) as blocking_session,floor(nvl(a.dbreplay_file_id,0)/4294967296) as capture_id,nvl(client_id,'NULL') as client_id,nvl(client_info,'NULL') as client_info,nvl(consumer_group_id, -1) as consumer_group_id,nvl(dbop_name, 'NULL') as dbop,nvl(ecid,'NULL') as ecid,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.event WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,18)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Query' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,19)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Populate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,20)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Prepopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,21)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Repopulate' WHEN bitand(a.time_model, power(2,22)) > 0 THEN 'CPU: IM Trickle Repop' ELSE 'CPU + Wait for CPU' END) as event,a.is_captured as is_captured,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and not (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_filtered_out,(case when (a.is_captured = 'N' and (a.session_type = 'BACKGROUND' or a.program like '% (J___)%')) then 'Y' else 'N' end) as is_nc_background,a.is_replayed as is_replayed,nvl(machine, 'NULL') as machine,machine || ',' || port as machine_port,nvl(module,'NULL') as module,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND a.event = 'enq: TM - contention' THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.p2,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' AND (a.wait_class IN ('User I/O', 'System I/O', 'Cluster', 'Application') OR a.event like '%buffer busy%') THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN 0 WHEN bitand(a.time_model,8126464) > 0 THEN GREATEST(NVL(a.current_obj#,0),0) ELSE 0 END) as object,decode(plsql_object_id, null, 'NULL', plsql_object_id || ',' || plsql_subprogram_id) as pl_sql,decode(plsql_object_id, null,'NULL', plsql_entry_object_id || ',' || plsql_entry_subprogram_id) as pl_sql_top,nvl(program,'NULL') as program,decode(qc_instance_id, null, 0, 0, 0, 1) as px_process,a.service_hash as service_hash, decode(session_type, 'FOREGROUND', '1', '0') as session_type,nvl(force_matching_signature,0) as sql_fms,nvl(top_level_sql_id,'NULL') as sql_id_top,sql_opcode as sql_opcode,top_level_sql_opcode as sql_opcode_top,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws,decode(sql_plan_operation, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || sql_plan_hash_value || ',' || sql_plan_line_id || ',' || sql_plan_operation || ',' || sql_plan_options) as sql_rws_line,nvl(sql_id, 'NULL') as sqlid,decode(sql_id, null, 'NULL', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_full_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null), sql_full_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_fullphv,decode(sql_id, null, 'null', sql_id || ',' || decode(sql_plan_hash_value,0,to_char(null),sql_plan_hash_value)) as sqlid_phv, NVL(a.user_id,-1) as user_id,(CASE WHEN a.session_state = 'WAITING' THEN a.wait_class ELSE 'CPU' END) as wait_class,nvl(xid,'0') as xid FROM AWR_PDB_ACTIVE_SESS_HISTORY a , sample_id_bounds WHERE a.dbid = :dbid AND a.snap_id >= :begin_snap AND a.snap_id <= :end_snap + 1 AND a.sample_time_utc >= :begin_timestamp AND a.sample_time_utc < :end_timestamp AND a.instance_number = sample_id_bounds.inst_id AND (sample_id_bounds.min_sample_id IS NULL OR sample_id_bounds.min_sample_id > a.sample_id) AND (a.session_state = 'ON CPU' OR a.wait_class <> 'Idle' ) ) ,unified_ash AS (SELECT /*+ NO_MERGE */ * FROM (SELECT * FROM mem_source UNION ALL SELECT * FROM disk_source)) , map_action as (SELECT action, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT action FROM unified_ash) ) , map_action_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("action", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(action) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_action) , map_blk_sess as (SELECT blocking_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT blocking_session FROM unified_ash) ) , map_blk_sess_xml as ( SELECT xmlelement("blocking_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(blocking_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_blk_sess) , map_captureid as (SELECT capture_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT capture_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id as (SELECT client_id, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_id_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_id) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_id) , map_client_info as (SELECT client_info, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT client_info FROM unified_ash) ) , map_client_info_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("client_info", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(client_info) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_client_info) , map_dbop as (SELECT dbop, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dbop FROM unified_ash) ) , map_dbop_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("dbop",sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(dbop) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_dbop) , map_ecid as (SELECT ecid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ecid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_ecid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("ecid", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(ecid) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_ecid) , map_event as (SELECT event, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT event FROM unified_ash) ) , map_event_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("event",sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( event as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_event) , map_machine as (SELECT machine, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine FROM unified_ash) ) , map_machine_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("machine", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(machine) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine) , map_machine_port as (SELECT machine_port, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT machine_port FROM unified_ash)) , map_machine_port_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("machine_port", sys.sys_ixmlagg(XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(machine_port as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_machine_port) , map_module as (SELECT module, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT module FROM unified_ash) ) , map_module_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("module", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(module) as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_module) , map_plsqlid as (SELECT pl_sql , rownum as id FROM (SELECT max(cnt), pl_sql FROM (SELECT pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql UNION ALL SELECT pl_sql_top as pl_sql , sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY pl_sql_top ) GROUP BY pl_sql ORDER BY 1 DESC) ), map_program as (SELECT program, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT program FROM unified_ash) ) , map_program_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("program", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("m", xmlattributes(program as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_program) , map_sqlfms as (SELECT sql_fms, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_fms FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlfms_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_fms", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_fms as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sqlfms) , map_sql_rws as (SELECT sql_rws, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrws_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws) , map_sql_rws_line as (SELECT sql_rws_line, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sql_rws_line FROM unified_ash) ) , map_sqlrwsline_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sql_rws_line", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sql_rws_line as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_sql_rws_line) , map_sqlid as (SELECT sqlid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT sqlid, max(cnt) as cnt FROM (SELECT sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sqlid UNION ALL SELECT sql_id_top as sqlid, sum(sample_count) as cnt FROM unified_ash GROUP BY sql_id_top) GROUP BY sqlid ORDER BY cnt DESC)) , map_fullphv as (SELECT sqlid_fullphv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_fullphv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_fullphv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_fullphv", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_fullphv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_fullphv) , map_phv as (SELECT sqlid_phv, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sqlid_phv FROM unified_ash) ) , map_phv_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("sqlid_phv", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( sqlid_phv as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_phv) , map_waitclass as (SELECT wait_class, rownum as id FROM (select DISTINCT wait_class FROM unified_ash) ) , map_waitclass_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("wait_class", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( wait_class as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_waitclass) , map_xid as (SELECT xid, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT xid FROM unified_ash) ) , map_xid_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("xid", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m",xmlattributes( xid as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM map_xid) , map_physical_session as (SELECT physical_session, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct physical_session FROM unified_ash ORDER BY physical_session)) , map_sess_xml as (SELECT xmlelement("physical_session", sys.sys_ixmlagg(xmlelement("m", xmlattributes( physical_session as "v", id as "i")))) as x FROM (SELECT * FROM map_physical_session ORDER BY id)) , map_instance_number as (SELECT instance_number, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT instance_number FROM unified_ash ORDER BY 1) ) , map_instance_names as (SELECT inst_id, substr(max(name),15) as name FROM ( SELECT inst_id, name FROM ( SELECT instance_number as inst_id, to_char(SYSDATE+7,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name as name FROM SYS.V_$instance ) UNION ALL SELECT instance_number as inst_id, max(to_char(startup_time,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || instance_name || ' ' || CHR(64) || ' ' || host_name ) as name FROM AWR_PDB_database_instance WHERE dbid = 3345192309 GROUP BY instance_number ) GROUP BY inst_id ) , map_instance_number_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("instance_number", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.instance_number as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as x FROM map_instance_number m, map_instance_names n WHERE n.inst_id(+) = m.instance_number), capture_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("capture_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", capture_id as "v", sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(name) as "name")))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id,m.capture_id, (NVL((select c.name from dba_workload_schedule_captures sc, dba_workload_captures c, dba_workload_replay_schedules sch where sc.capture_id=c.id and sch.schedule_name=sc.schedule_name and sch.status='CURRENT' and sc.schedule_cap_id=m.capture_id and rownum < 2 ), 'other activity')) as name FROM map_captureid m)) , map_consumer_id as (select consumer_group_id , rownum as id from (select distinct consumer_group_id from unified_ash)) , map_cg_names as (SELECT consumer_group_id , max(CONSUMER_GROUP_NAME) as name FROM AWR_PDB_RSRC_CONSUMER_GROUP WHERE dbid = 3345192309 AND (consumer_group_id ) IN (SELECT consumer_group_id FROM map_consumer_id) AND snap_id >= 302 AND snap_id <= 304 GROUP BY consumer_group_id ), consumer_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("consumer_group_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.consumer_group_id as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_consumer_id m, map_cg_names n WHERE m.consumer_group_id = n.consumer_group_id(+) ), map_object as (SELECT object , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), object FROM unified_ash GROUP BY object ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , obj_names as (SELECT object , sys.dbms_ash.fetch_obj_name(object, 3345192309,3345192309,'Y','PDB','N','Y') as name FROM map_object WHERE id <= 20 AND object > 0) ,obj_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("object", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.object as "v" , extractvalue(n.name,'/a/n') as "name", extractvalue(n.name,'/a/t') as "type" )))) as xml FROM map_object m, obj_names n WHERE m.object = n.object(+) ), plsql_names as (SELECT id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_procedure_name( to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql,1, instr(pl_sql, ',')-1), '0')) ,to_number(NVL(substr(pl_sql, instr(pl_sql, ',')+1), '0')) , NULL ,'Y') as name FROM map_plsqlid WHERE id < 20 AND pl_sql LIKE '%,%' ) , plsql_id_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("pl_sql", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(m.id as "i", m.pl_sql as "v" , n.name as "name")))) as xml FROM map_plsqlid m, plsql_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , map_service as (SELECT service_hash, rownum as id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT service_hash FROM unified_ash) ) , map_service_names as (SELECT service_name_hash as service_hash, max(service_name) as name FROM AWR_PDB_service_name WHERE dbid = 3345192309 GROUP BY service_name_hash ) , serv_hash_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("service_hash", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.service_hash as "v" , sys.dbms_ash.str_to_ascii(n.name) as "name")))) as xml FROM map_service m, map_service_names n WHERE n.service_hash(+) = m.service_hash), sql_opcode_map as (SELECT sql_opcode, rownum as id FROM (SELECT distinct sql_opcode FROM unified_ash UNION select distinct sql_opcode_top as sql_opcode FROM unified_ash)) , sql_opcode_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sql_opcode", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(t.id as "i", t.sql_opcode as "v", v.command_name as "name")))) as xml FROM sql_opcode_map t, sys.v_$sqlcommand v WHERE t.sql_opcode = v.command_type(+) ), sql_id_text as (SELECT t.sqlid, t.id, sys.dbms_ash.fetch_sqltext(t.sqlid, 3345192309,3345192309,'Y','Y','N','Y') as sql_text FROM map_sqlid t WHERE t.id <= 20) , sql_id_text_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("sqlid", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES(id as "i", sqlid as "v", extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/c') as "op"), XMLCDATA(extractvalue(sql_text, '/a/s'))))) as xml FROM (SELECT m.id, m.sqlid, t.sql_text FROM sql_id_text t, map_sqlid m WHERE m.sqlid = t.sqlid (+))), map_user_id as (SELECT user_id , rownum as id FROM (SELECT sum(sample_count), user_id FROM unified_ash GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY 1 DESC)) , user_names as (SELECT m.id, u.username as name, CASE WHEN (u.common='YES' AND u.application='NO') THEN 'y' ELSE 'n' END as common FROM map_user_id m, dba_users u WHERE m.user_id = u.user_id) , user_name_xml as (SELECT XMLELEMENT("user_id", sys.sys_ixmlagg( XMLELEMENT("m", XMLATTRIBUTES( m.id as "i" , m.user_id as "v" , n.name as "name" , n.common as "co" )))) as xml FROM map_user_id m, user_names n WHERE m.id = n.id(+)) , ash_xml as (SELECT xmlconcat( xmlelement("dimensions",'sample_time, bucket_number, sample_count,physical_session,instance_number,action,blocking_session,capture_id,client_id,client_info,consumer_group_id,dbop,ecid,event,is_captured,is_filtered_out,is_nc_background,is_replayed,machine,machine_port,module,object,pl_sql,pl_sql_top,program,px_process,service_hash,session_type,sql_fms,sql_id_top,sql_opcode,sql_opcode_top,sql_rws,sql_rws_line,sqlid,sqlid_fullphv,sqlid_phv,user_id,wait_class,xid'), xmlelement("dimension_is_map", 'N,N,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,N,N,N,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,N,Y,N,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y,Y'), xmlelement("data", sys.sys_ixmlagg( xmlelement("a", ash.t || ',' || ash.bucket_number || ',' || ROUND(ash.sample_count,2) || ',' || map_physical_session.id || ',' || map_instance_number.id || ',' ||map_action.id|| ',' ||map_blk_sess.id|| ',' ||map_captureid.id|| ',' ||map_client_id.id|| ',' ||map_client_info.id|| ',' ||map_consumer_id.id|| ',' ||map_dbop.id|| ',' ||map_ecid.id|| ',' ||map_event.id|| ',' ||is_captured|| ',' ||is_filtered_out|| ',' ||is_nc_background|| ',' ||is_replayed|| ',' ||map_machine.id|| ',' ||map_machine_port.id|| ',' ||map_module.id|| ',' ||map_object.id|| ',' ||map_plsqlid.id|| ',' ||map_top_plsqlid.id|| ',' ||map_program.id|| ',' ||px_process|| ',' ||map_service.id|| ',' ||session_type|| ',' ||map_sqlfms.id|| ',' ||map_top_sqlid.id|| ',' ||sql_opcode_map.id|| ',' ||map_top_sqlopcode.id|| ',' ||map_sql_rws.id|| ',' ||map_sql_rws_line.id|| ',' ||map_sqlid.id|| ',' ||map_fullphv.id|| ',' ||map_phv.id|| ',' ||map_user_id.id|| ',' ||map_waitclass.id|| ',' ||map_xid.id ) order by ash.bucket_number, ash.t, ash.physical_session))) as x FROM unified_ash ash, map_physical_session, map_instance_number ,map_action,map_blk_sess,map_captureid,map_client_id,map_client_info,map_consumer_id,map_dbop,map_ecid,map_event,map_machine,map_machine_port,map_module,map_object,map_plsqlid,map_plsqlid map_top_plsqlid,map_program,map_service,map_sqlfms,map_sqlid map_top_sqlid,sql_opcode_map,sql_opcode_map map_top_sqlopcode,map_sql_rws,map_sql_rws_line,map_sqlid,map_fullphv,map_phv,map_user_id,map_waitclass,map_xid WHERE ash.physical_session = map_physical_session.physical_session AND ash.instance_number = map_instance_number.instance_number AND ash.action = map_action.action AND ash.blocking_session = map_blk_sess.blocking_session AND ash.capture_id = map_captureid.capture_id AND ash.client_id = map_client_id.client_id AND ash.client_info = map_client_info.client_info AND ash.consumer_group_id = map_consumer_id.consumer_group_id AND ash.dbop = map_dbop.dbop AND ash.ecid = map_ecid.ecid AND ash.event = map_event.event AND ash.machine = map_machine.machine AND ash.machine_port = map_machine_port.machine_port AND ash.module = map_module.module AND ash.object = map_object.object AND ash.pl_sql = map_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.pl_sql_top = map_top_plsqlid.pl_sql AND ash.program = map_program.program AND ash.service_hash = map_service.service_hash AND ash.sql_fms = map_sqlfms.sql_fms AND ash.sql_id_top = map_top_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sql_opcode = sql_opcode_map.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_opcode_top = map_top_sqlopcode.sql_opcode AND ash.sql_rws = map_sql_rws.sql_rws AND ash.sql_rws_line = map_sql_rws_line.sql_rws_line AND ash.sqlid = map_sqlid.sqlid AND ash.sqlid_fullphv = map_fullphv.sqlid_fullphv AND ash.sqlid_phv = map_phv.sqlid_phv AND ash.user_id = map_user_id.user_id AND ash.wait_class = map_waitclass.wait_class AND ash.xid = map_xid.xid), ashdata as ( SELECT xmlelement("ash_data", xmlattributes(round(nvl(:sample_ratio,1),4) as "sampling_ratio"), map_sess_xml.x, map_instance_number_xml.x, ash_xml.x , map_action_xml.x , map_blk_sess_xml.x , capture_id_name_xml.xml , map_client_id_xml.x , map_client_info_xml.x , consumer_id_name_xml.xml , map_dbop_xml.x , map_ecid_xml.x , map_event_xml.x , map_machine_xml.x , map_machine_port_xml.x , map_module_xml.x , obj_name_xml.xml , plsql_id_name_xml.xml , map_program_xml.x , serv_hash_name_xml.xml , map_sqlfms_xml.x , sql_opcode_xml.xml , map_sqlrws_xml.x , map_sqlrwsline_xml.x , sql_id_text_xml.xml , map_fullphv_xml.x , map_phv_xml.x , user_name_xml.xml , map_waitclass_xml.x , map_xid_xml.x ) as data FROM ash_xml, map_sess_xml, map_instance_number_xml , map_action_xml, map_blk_sess_xml, capture_id_name_xml, map_client_id_xml, map_client_info_xml, consumer_id_name_xml, map_dbop_xml, map_ecid_xml, map_event_xml, map_machine_xml, map_machine_port_xml, map_module_xml, obj_name_xml, plsql_id_name_xml, map_program_xml, PROCESS_NAME, SID, SQL_ID, SQL_EXEC_START, SQL_EXEC_ID, DBOP_NAME, DBOP_EXEC_ID, SQL_PLAN_HASH_VALUE, SQL_FULL_PLAN_HASH_VALUE, SESSION_SERIAL#, SQL_TEXT, PX_SERVER#, PX_SERVER_GROUP, PX_SERVER_SET, CONCURRENCY_WAIT_TIME+ CLUSTER_WAIT_TIME+ USER_IO_WAIT_TIME+ QUEUING_TIME) ELSE ELAPSED_TIME END ELAPSED_TIME, QUEUING_TIME, CPU_TIME, APPLICATION_WAIT_TIME, CONCURRENCY_WAIT_TIME, CLUSTER_WAIT_TIME, USER_IO_WAIT_TIME, CASE WHEN ELAPSED_TIME < (CPU_TIME+ APPLICATION_WAIT_TIME+ CONCURRENCY_WAIT_TIME+ CLUSTER_WAIT_TIME+ USER_IO_WAIT_TIME+ QUEUING_TIME) THEN 0 ELSE ELAPSED_TIME - (CPU_TIME+ APPLICATION_WAIT_TIME+ CONCURRENCY_WAIT_TIME+ CLUSTER_WAIT_TIME+ USER_IO_WAIT_TIME+ QUEUING_TIME) END OTHER_WAIT_TIME, PLSQL_EXEC_TIME, JAVA_EXEC_TIME, FETCHES, BUFFER_GETS, IO_INTERCONNECT_BYTES IO_INTER_BYTES, PHYSICAL_READ_REQUESTS READ_REQS, PHYSICAL_READ_BYTES READ_BYTES, PHYSICAL_WRITE_REQUESTS WRITE_REQS, PHYSICAL_WRITE_BYTES WRITE_BYTES, NVL(PHYSICAL_READ_BYTES, 0) + NVL(PHYSICAL_WRITE_BYTES, 0) IO_BYTES, NVL(PHYSICAL_READ_REQUESTS, 0) + NVL(PHYSICAL_WRITE_REQUESTS, 0) IO_REQS, IO_CELL_UNCOMPRESSED_BYTES IO_UNC_BYTES, IO_CELL_OFFLOAD_ELIGIBLE_BYTES IO_ELIG_BYTES, PLSQL_ENTRY_OBJECT_ID PL_ENTRY_OID, PLSQL_ENTRY_SUBPROGRAM_ID PL_ENTRY_PROGID, PX_MAXDOP MAX_DOP, PX_IS_CROSS_INSTANCE, PX_MAXDOP_INSTANCES MAX_DOP_INSTANCES, PX_SERVERS_REQUESTED SERVERS_REQUESTED, PX_SERVERS_ALLOCATED SERVERS_ALLOCATED, ERROR_NUMBER, ERROR_FACILITY, ERROR_MESSAGE, NVL2(OTHER_XML, 'Y', NULL) HAS_OTHER_XML, NVL2(BINDS_XML, 'Y', NULL) HAS_BINDS_XML, NVL2(RM_CONSUMER_GROUP, NVL2(RM_LAST_ACTION_TIME, TO_CHAR(RM_LAST_ACTION_TIME, :B12 ), '00/00/0000 00:00:01') || XMLELEMENT( "rminfo", XMLATTRIBUTES( RM_LAST_ACTION AS "rmlastact", RM_LAST_ACTION_REASON AS "rmlastreason", TO_CHAR(RM_LAST_ACTION_TIME, :B12 ) AS "rmlasttime", RM_CONSUMER_GROUP AS "rmcg")).GETSTRINGVAL(), '00/00/0000 00:00:00') RM_INFO, CON_NAME, CON_ID FROM V$ALL_SQL_MONITOR MO1 WHERE USERENV('INSTANCE') BETWEEN :B11 AND :B10 AND MO1.SQL_ID = NVL(:B9 , MO1.SQL_ID) AND MO1.SQL_EXEC_START = NVL(:B8 , MO1.SQL_EXEC_START) AND MO1.SQL_EXEC_ID = NVL(:B7 , MO1.SQL_EXEC_ID) OR (MO1.DBOP_NAME = NVL(:B6 , MO1.DBOP_NAME) AND MO1.DBOP_EXEC_ID = NVL(:B5 , MO1.DBOP_EXEC_ID)) AND ((:B4 = 1 AND MO1.PX_QCSID IS NULL) OR (MO1.PX_SERVER_GROUP = NVL(:B3 , MO1.PX_SERVER_GROUP) AND MO1.PX_SERVER_SET = NVL(:B2 , MO1.PX_SERVER_SET) AND MO1.PX_SERVER# = NVL(:B1 , MO1.PX_SERVER#))) ))) ), MONITOR_AGG AS (SELECT MAX_PX_QCSID, MAX_KEY, MAX_INST_ID, MAX_SESSION_ID, MAX_SESSION_SERIAL, MAX_PX_DOP, MAX_PX_DOP_INSTANCES, MAX_PX_IS_CROSS_INSTANCE, SUM_SERVERS_REQUESTED, SUM_SERVERS_ALLOCATED, DIST_INST_COUNT, DIST_PX_GROUP_COUNT, DIST_PX_SET_COUNT, MAX_PLAN_HASH_VALUE, MAX_FULL_PLAN_HASH_VALUE, MAX_PL_OID IS NOT NULL THEN NVL((SELECT P.OWNER || '.' || P.OBJECT_NAME || DECODE(P.PROCEDURE_NAME, NULL, '', '.' || P.PROCEDURE_NAME) FROM ALL_PROCEDURES P WHERE P.OBJECT_ID = MAX_PL_OID AND P.SUBPROGRAM_ID = MAX_PL_PROGID AND ROWNUM = 1), 'Unavailable') END MAX_PL_NAME, CASE WHEN MAX_PL_ENTRY_OID IS NOT NULL THEN NVL((SELECT P.OWNER || '.' || P.OBJECT_NAME || DECODE(P.PROCEDURE_NAME, NULL, '', '.' || P.PROCEDURE_NAME) FROM ALL_PROCEDURES P WHERE P.OBJECT_ID = MAX_PL_ENTRY_OID AND P.SUBPROGRAM_ID = MAX_PL_ENTRY_PROGID AND ROWNUM = 1), 'Unavailable') END MAX_PL_ENTRY_NAME,
